title: CobbleFurnies Woodland Mansion
description: Minecraft's Woodland Mansions redecorated with blocks from Cobblemon and CobbleFurnies!
body: A redecoration of Minecraft's woodland mansions, with blocks from Cobblemon and CobbleFurnies (If you would like ConnectedGlass, there is another version on my profile). I kept the structure registered as a standard mansion, so any structure based spawns should still work, unless they also require specific nearby blocks, as some blocks have obviously changed. I did also update the "mansion" spawn pretext, so anything using that should also work with this pack.
